items.question_zh: 目标是否单一、清晰、可机器验证？
items.question_en: Is the goal single, clear, and machine-verifiable?

items.question_zh: 是否有一个产出 pass/fail 的快速检查让循环自主闭合？
items.question_en: Is there a fast pass/fail check that closes the loop on its own?

items.question_zh: agent 是否获得足够上下文（代码、约定、约束）？
items.question_en: Does the agent get sufficient context (code, conventions, constraints)?

items.question_zh: 每步是否足够小且有反馈，而不是一次大跳？
items.question_en: Are steps small with per-step feedback rather than one big jump?

items.question_zh: 失败时是否换策略而非机械撞墙？
items.question_en: Does it change strategy on failure rather than head-bang?

items.question_zh: 是否设有最大轮数和 token/成本预算？
items.question_en: Are max-iterations and a token/cost budget set?

items.question_zh: checker 是否独立于 maker（全新上下文、只看 diff+标准）？
items.question_en: Is the checker separate from the maker (fresh context, diff+criteria only)?

items.question_zh: 状态是否外置以在上下文重置后存活？
items.question_en: Is state externalized so it survives context resets?

items.question_zh: 是否产出可审计的最终总结（根因、改动、检查、结果、剩余风险）？
items.question_en: Does it produce an auditable final summary (root cause, changes, checks, results, residual risk)?
